form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 400m in 22.97. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when seventh over 400m at this track at Grade 4/5 level. Major threat on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 400m in 22.97. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when seventh over 400m at this track at Grade 4/5 level. Major threat on best form.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 400m in 22.96 last start, beating Flying Saucer. Back in top order and looks the one to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 400m in 22.96 last start, beating Flying Saucer. Back in top order and looks the one to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened and checked approaching the 1st turn.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing last when well beaten on April 11 over 515m at this track in a Grade 5. Looks up against it this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing last when well beaten on April 11 over 515m at this track in a Grade 5. Looks up against it this time.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (23.12) over 400m at this track. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Prefer others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second last start (23.12) over 400m at this track. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Prefer others.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (23.07) at big odds over 400m at this track. Has to overcome a wide draw and looks tested this line up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when third (23.07) at big odds over 400m at this track. Has to overcome a wide draw and looks tested this line up.

form.formComment: Has failed to fire at the last couple but he does have a good record at the track and trip, including two wins. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has failed to fire at the last couple but he does have a good record at the track and trip, including two wins. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and came together on jumping.

form.formComment: Hasn't been that impressive recently but he has solid credentials over this track and distance. The form out of the last run measures up. Among the chances.
